SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.supernaut.CommandResponse

Packages that use CommandResponse
Package
Description
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.api
Public API interfaces exposing Supernaut services over Spring Cloud Functions.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.exceptions
Exceptions for Supernaut online errors.
com.nib.supernaut.files
File control and access management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.queues
Transient Data (TD) and Temporary Storage (TS) queue management for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal
General terminal control and emulation handling for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.jsonterminal
JSON terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.printer
virtual printer terminal services
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.tn3270
TN3270 terminal services

    Addresses the CWA (Common Work Area) and sets the pointer to its address.

    Asks for the current time and sets the absolute time variable.

    Assigns the abend code to the specified field.

    SupernautContext.endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, boolean handleAid, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2)
    Handles the end of CICS command execution by processing the command response, updating EIB fields, handling conditions and errors, and determining the appropriate action based on procedural logic or exception handling.
    protected CommandResponse

    Finalizes the execution of a command and returns the resulting response.

    protected CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, boolean handleAid, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2)
    Handles the end of CICS command execution by processing the command response, updating EIB fields, handling conditions and errors, and determining the appropriate action based on procedural logic or exception handling.
    protected CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.endExec(CommandResponse commandResp, CicsCommands cmd, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable resp, IntegerVariable resp2)
    Finalizes the execution of a command and returns the resulting response.
